description:
cloudstack_ssh_keypair

Creates or registers an SSH key pair.

argument_reference.name: name
argument_reference.description: The name of the SSH key pair. This is a unique value within a CloudStack account. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: public_key
argument_reference.description: The public key to register with CloudStack. If this is omitted, CloudStack will generate a new key pair. The key can be loaded from a file on disk using the file() function. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: project
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the project to register this key to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: fingerprint
attributes_reference.description: The fingerprint of the public key specified or created.

attributes_reference.name: private_key
attributes_reference.description: The private key generated by CloudStack. Only available if CloudStack generated the key pair.
